CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Sneha searched everywhere for the real JAIN MBA fee.

The JAIN Online MBA Fee, In Full

  • 1
    ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester). That is the complete tuition, no hidden charges.
  • 2
    ₹2,500 one-time registration. That is it for the essentials.
  • 3
    Pay upfront for a discount, or choose 0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month.
  • 4
    A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MBA from JAIN (Deemed-to-be-University).

SPECIAL POWER 1

Master AI Tools from Semester 1

AI isn't an afterthought here - you apply real AI tools from your very first semester, in every subject.

SPECIAL POWER 2

Powered byGoogleMicrosoftIndustry Experts
SPECIAL POWER 3

Learn Your Way, Fully Supported

Weekend Live ClassesBatch Owner SupportVirtual LabsSunday Social Network
